verification_gate: Every cadence has observed inputs, bounded decisions, stale-data handling, owner escalation, proof, rollback or non-action, and no hidden mutation.

every_cadence_has_observed_inputs.detail: Each of the 10 work_items lists >=3 named observed_inputs traceable to a Blueprint section, the Context Matrix, STORE-001, ADOPT-001, or an existing reconciled evidence file (heartbeat_lane_a/b, p0_priority_report, verification_runtime_report, mvp_bundle_report, authority_integrity_report, adopted_capabilities.source.csv).

every_cadence_has_bounded_decisions.detail: Each work_item enumerates a finite 3-value decision set of the form {intact/healthy, observed, escalate}; none emits an open-ended action.

every_cadence_has_stale_data_handling.detail: Each work_item defines explicit stale-input behavior: Daily Pulse treats redb-WAL buffered state as non-canonical; Weekly Sync flags cutover-pending without auto-cutover; Quarterly Refactor re-seeds ESN initial conditions; Health reports degraded when db_health unreachable; Drift re-anchors rather than silently promotes a baseline; Security treats unwitnessed claims as untrusted; Provenance flags orphaned blobs; Capability treats stale parity receipts as unverified; Cost falls back to the conservative forecast bound; Authority re-checks separation each run.

every_cadence_has_owner_escalation.detail: Each work_item names the LifeOS Governance Agent as the raising owner and David as the human escalation target for the specific threshold (MinCut sever, parity drift, irreversible refactor, PITR gap, spiral-out-of-bounds, secret exposure, orphaned durable data, downgrade/duplicate, budget exhaustion, single-writer violation).

every_cadence_has_proof.detail: Each cadence is defined as proof-producing: it appends a typed proof-ledger record (heartbeat, weekly-sync, quarterly-refactor, health, drift, security, provenance, capability, cost, authority), consistent with the existing OPS-001 ops-heartbeat.v0 lineage.

every_cadence_has_rollback_or_non_action.rollback_plan: Restore the archived operations plan; no production state is changed.
every_cadence_has_rollback_or_non_action.detail: All 10 cadences default to non-action (observation only). Health and Cost may emit a bounded RECOMMENDATION (db_migrate / RuvLTRA re-route) but never execute it; Quarterly Refactor additionally discards every simulated COW branch. Rollback is the archived-operations-plan restore for all cadences.

every_cadence_has_no_hidden_mutation.detail: Every work_item asserts read-only observation with writes confined to generated/** and proof_records/**; no cadence performs production mutation, autonomous remediation, external action, or touches secrets/** (blocked_paths from the LIVING-001 task row are honored for all 10 cadences).

store_001_alignment.single_durable_writer: Daily Pulse and Weekly Sync never treat redb buffered/WAL state as canonical; Authority audit re-verifies PostgreSQL is the single durable writer of every macro-state class and that redb is never a second durable writer.
store_001_alignment.forward_only_sync: Weekly Sync observes redb -> envctl -> PostgreSQL forward-only flush; it never dual-writes.
store_001_alignment.verified_cutover: Weekly Sync flags any redb-durable class as cutover-pending and requires a green blobstore_parity.rs run before cutover; it never auto-cuts over.
store_001_alignment.no_sidecar: Health/Drift/Security cadences observe RuVector operating as a native PostgreSQL extension, not a sidecar.
store_001_alignment.provenance_preserved: Provenance audit checks that every durable class keeps its SHA-256 identity and source commit/PR lineage (adopted_capabilities.source.csv).

existing_evidence_reconciled.note: The task next_action ('Reconcile existing heartbeat and priority work as evidence, then decompose bounded audit loops') is satisfied: existing OPS-001 heartbeat and CAP-001 priority surfaces are cited as observed inputs, and the observation loop is decomposed into 10 bounded cadences.

proof_summary: LIVING-001 defines the LIFEOS-012 living-system observation layer as exactly ten proof-producing governance operations enumerated verbatim from the task goal: three time cadences (Daily Pulse over the redb scratchpad + MinCut swarm graph via UDS; Weekly Sync over the envctl redb->embed->PostgreSQL forward flush and BlobStore SHA-256 parity; Quarterly Refactor over ATAS/ESN forecasts across COW-isolated staging branches) and seven domain audits (health over db_health and the verification runtime; drift over ATAS boundary constraints, MinCut, and Causal Graph coverage; security over SHAKE256 Witness Chains and secret-output guards; provenance over SHA-256 content identity and commit/PR lineage; capability over the ADOPT-001 map and STORE-001 six state-class assignments owned exactly once; cost over ATAS resource-burn and RuvLTRA routing tiers; authority over the STORE-001 single-durable-writer invariants and verifier/executor separation). Every one of the ten carries all seven gate clauses: >=3 named observed inputs, a finite 3-value bounded decision set, explicit stale-data handling that never treats transient redb/WAL state or a stale baseline as canonical, escalation from the LifeOS Governance Agent to David, a proof-ledger record, a non-action default (with only Health and Cost emitting non-executing recommendations and Quarterly Refactor discarding its COW branches) plus the archived-operations-plan rollback, and a no-hidden-mutation assertion confining writes to generated/** and proof_records/** while honoring the blocked_paths (production mutation, autonomous remediation, external action, secrets/**). Every observed input traces to the Architecture Blueprint, the Architecture Context Matrix, STORE-001, ADOPT-001, or an already-materialized evidence file in the package. This is a definition-only planning artifact: no cadence was run, no production state was mutated, and no autonomous remediation was performed.

live_commands.purpose: Validate LIVING-001 cadence family gate: 10 cadences present, each carrying all 7 required clauses, non-empty
output: LIVING-001: cadences=10 time=3 domain=7 all_seven_clauses_present=True all_clauses_nonempty=True valid_json=True
